my-work.title: Entrepreneurship
my-work.description: As the Co-Founder and CTO of BRAVE UP!, I lead an AI-powered platform focused on helping schools detect, predict, and prevent bullying and cyberbullying. Through our data-driven approach, we leverage advanced technology and analytics to provide schools with the tools they need to create safer and more supportive environments for students, achieving significant results.

project-1.braveup-app-description: Web application designed to assist schools in predicting and preventing instances of bullying and cyberbullying.

project-2.braveup-website-description: Website for BRAVE UP! an edTech startup that works with k-12 schools. The purpose of this website is to showcase the functionality of the platform and act as the main point of contact for clients.

project-3.braveup-admin-description: The Admin Platform is a web tool for efficient CRUD management of entities like users and resources. It offers a dashboard, easy navigation with search and filters, ensuring both flexibility and compliance.

venture.description: Co-founded and led the technology vision of Brave Up!, an EdTech startup focused on student wellbeing and bullying prevention. Built the platform from the ground up, scaling it to over 100,000 users across multiple countries while leading engineering, product strategy, and cross-functional teams.

cards.title: Product Platform
cards.description: Built the web and mobile experience used by students, teachers, and schools, focusing on engagement, accessibility, and real-time insights.

cards.title: AI & Analytics
cards.description: Developed predictive models, dashboards, and analytics tools to help schools identify risks and support student wellbeing through data-driven decisions.

cards.title: Leadership
cards.description: Led engineering, product strategy, and technology decisions while scaling the platform internationally and building multidisciplinary teams.

projects.description: Exploring ideas, building products, and transforming complex problems into simple, scalable solutions powered by AI and modern technologies.

project-1.title: DEAL ADVISOR
project-1.description: Deal Advisor is an AI-powered shopping assistant that analyzes reviews, videos, and community discussions to help people make smarter buying decisions with confidence.

project-2.title: DATA BREW
project-2.description: AI-powered data extraction and transformation platform that converts unstructured information into structured datasets. Users can upload screenshots, documents, or raw text and instantly transform them into JSON, CSV, Excel, or SQL-ready formats. By automating data extraction and organization, DataBrew helps developers, businesses, and researchers save time and focus on what matters most: using their data

ai-assistant.title: ASK_MY_PORTFOLIO / LOCAL_AI_DEMO
ai-assistant.description: Interactive AI assistant powered by local LLMs. Ask questions about my experience, projects, and technical expertise - all running privately in your browser.
ai-assistant.input-placeholder: Ask about my AI projects, GCP experience, architecture, or leadership...
